issues.detail: The skill documentation does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Build a debounced live-search box without writing JS
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses hx-get with hx-trigger="input changed delay:300ms" and hx-target on the results div, exactly as the skill's triggers section; baseline writes manual fetch+setTimeout JS.

scenarios.name: Delete-a-row-and-update-counter pattern in a server-rendered app
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combines hx-delete with hx-target="closest article"/hx-swap="outerHTML swap:300ms" and uses hx-swap-oob to refresh the counter from one response, matching the skill's OOB pattern.
